CreateLbdc.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters
CreateLbdc.name: Cluster name, 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and the characters -/._
CreateLbdc.type: Cluster type, valid values are "4Layer" or "7Layer"
CreateLbdc.ccuCount: Cluster Capacity Unit (CCU), the performance capacity unit used to measure various metrics when a BLB cluster processes traffic
CreateLbdc.desc: Description of the LBDC, up to 200 characters
CreateLbdc.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing; Prepaid or Postpaid — currently only Prepaid is supported
CreateLbdc.billing.billingMethod: Billing method, required for postpaid; "BySpec" for fixed specification, "ByCapacityUnit" for usage-based billing
CreateLbdc.billing.reservation: Reservation details; not required for postpaid, mandatory for prepaid
CreateLbdc.renewReservation: Auto-renewal configuration, specifies whether to enable automatic renewal
CreateLbdc.renewReservation.reservationLength: Purchase duration in months, valid values: [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,12,24,36]
CreateLbdc.tags.tagKey: Tag key, may contain uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and the special characters -\_ /., length 1–65
CreateLbdc.tags.tagValue: Tag value, may contain uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and the special characters -\_ /., length 0–65
